text: The Teuto climbing guide contains maps and routing information for rock climbing in Bielefeld Senne.
Baking bread at Bäckerei Lamm is a centuries-old craft involving wheat, rye, sourdough, and traditional wood-fired ovens.
Indoor climbing halls like DAV Alpinzentrum provide climbing training and bouldering routes.
Modern shopping malls like Loom in Bielefeld feature fashion shops, electronics stores, and food courts.
Teutoburg Forest offers beautiful trails for hiking, running, and climbing in nature.
